category_sources: Official GitHub README says resvg is an SVG rendering library usable as Rust library, C library, and CLI application.
source_facts.description says resvg is an SVG rendering tool and library.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses resvg.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents purpose, features, limitations, SVG support, and usage surface.
Official repository contains a docs directory for additional project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/linebender/resvg, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes Rust/C libraries plus CLI rendering of static SVG files.
